differences.dallas: Dallas County Health and Human Services Food Establishment Permit required. Annual renewal.
differences.austin: Austin Public Health Food Enterprise Permit required. Must pass pre-opening health inspection.
TABC Mixed Beverage Permit required for beer garden. Approximately $3,000/year. All servers must hold TABC certification.

differences.dallas: Food trucks operate under a mobile food vendor permit. No fixed-location zoning required.
differences.austin: Brick-and-mortar restaurant requires CS (Commercial Services) or MU (Mixed Use) zoning. Beer garden requires outdoor seating zoning approval.
Commercial Building Permit required for any interior build-out or renovation. Fire marshal inspection required before opening.

differences.dallas: Texas Comptroller Sales Tax Permit required — applies statewide.
differences.austin: No change. Your existing Texas Sales Tax Permit is valid statewide. Update your business address if your principal place of business changes.
